sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, json_data JSON, timestamp_data TIMESTAMP(3) WITH TIME ZONE);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, json_data, timestamp_data) VALUES (1, json '{"n": 3.5}', timestamp(3) with time zone '2021-01-01 10:00:00.000+01:00');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, json_data, timestamp_data) VALUES (2, json '{"n": null}', timestamp(3) with time zone '2021-01-02 11:00:00.000+02:00');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, json_data, timestamp_data) VALUES (3, json '{"n": 7}', timestamp(3) with time zone '2021-01-03 12:00:00.000+03:00');
SELECT id, json.number(json_data) AS json_number, timestamp_data FROM test_table WHERE json.number(json_data) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, json.number(json_data) AS json_number, timestamp_data FROM test_table WHERE json.number(json_data) + 1 > 5 ORDER BY json_number DESC;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY json.number(json_data)) AS count_per_number, timestamp_data FROM test_table WHERE json.number(json_data) IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE join_table (join_id INT PRIMARY KEY, related_id INT REFERENCES test_table(id));

SELECT j.join_id, json.number(t.json_data) AS json_number FROM join_table j JOIN test_table t ON j.related_id = t.id WHERE json.number(t.json_data) IS NOT NULL GROUP BY j.join_id, json.number(t.json_data);
SELECT id, json.number(json_data) AS json_number, timestamp_data FROM test_table ORDER BY json.number(json_data) IS NULL, json_number;
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE json.number(json_data) IS NOT NULL HAVING MAX(timestamp_data) > timestamp(3) with time zone '2022-01-01 00:00:00.000+00:00';
